title: Steamed Steamy Russian Butter Beans Stew
description: An earthy and dense one-pot vegetarian dish featuring butter beans steamed to perfection, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Trim the ends of the onion and cut it into half-moons. Peel and mince the garlic cloves.
In a large pot, combine the butter beans, halved onions, minced garlic, tomato paste, water or vegetable broth, salt, black pepper, dill, and bay leaves. Stir well to mix all ingredients evenly.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 45 minutes until the beans are tender and the liquid has reduced slightly.
Serve hot with crusty bread or as a side dish.
